title: Transboundary Water Conflict Risk In Climate-Stressed River Basins
summary: Build a verified workflow for identifying where climate-driven water stress increases transboundary conflict risk, linking water-availability projections, upstream-downstream dependency data, and institutional-capacity data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for identifying where climate-driven water stress increases transboundary conflict risk, linking water-availability projections, upstream-downstream dependency data, and institutional-capacity data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
